objective: Increase causal density between existing canon layers so the world feels connected, immersive, alive, real, natural, and high fantasy without introducing outside intellectual property.

governing_rule.upward: Connect each major canon element to cosmology, catastrophe legacy, or deep myth.
governing_rule.sideways: Connect each major canon element to at least two institutions, factions, routes, or neighboring systems.
governing_rule.downward: Connect each major canon element to daily life, material culture, labor, law, or household practice.
governing_rule.forward: Connect each major canon element to campaign consequences, rumor movement, market change, civic stress, or route condition shifts.
